heading: Report
label: 12880 Report
notes: Amendments1995— in section catchline substituted “Report” for “Annual report”, and in introductory provisions substituted “The Secretary shall no later than ,” for “The Secretary shall annually”.Pub. L. 104–66December 31, 1995
amendments: Amendments1995— in section catchline substituted “Report” for “Annual report”, and in introductory provisions substituted “The Secretary shall no later than ,” for “The Secretary shall annually”.Pub. L. 104–66December 31, 1995

children.text: the number, type and cost of eligible properties transferred pursuant to this part;
the income, race, gender, children and other characteristics of families participating (or not participating) in homeownership programs funded under this part;
the amount and type of financial assistance provided under and in conjunction with this part;
the amount of financial assistance provided under this part that was needed to ensure continued affordability and meet future maintenance and repair costs; and
the recommendations of the Secretary for statutory and regulatory improvements to the program.
